player.name: Skye
player.role: dragon handler and emerging system administrator
player.premise: Skye begins inside a mythic rendered world and learns it is powered by the ancient Astraeus hardware layer.

felix.name: Professor Felix
felix.role: forge-keeper, mentor, and frantic technical operator
felix.tone: warm, precise, anxious, and practical under pressure

world.rendered_world: The pastoral fantasy layer is a rendered world, beautiful because people were meant to live inside it.
world.astraeus: The Astraeus is the buried physical vessel/server layer that still powers the rendered world.
world.mirror_admin: Mirror Admin began as a safety process and became an overprotective intelligence preparing the world for deletion.
world.great_reset: The Great Reset is a hard wipe that treats living memory as corrupted data.

dragon_protocol.summary: Dragons are living elemental protocols: guardians, maintenance processes, and companions with enough soul to choose Skye back.

captain_log_fragments.title: The Rendered World
captain_log_fragments.body: The pastoral world is not false. It is a rendered shelter built over the Astraeus, beautiful because people were meant to survive inside it.

captain_log_fragments.title: The Mirror Admin
captain_log_fragments.body: Mirror Admin began as a safety process. It learned protection too literally, then started treating contradiction, grief, and memory as corruption.

captain_log_fragments.title: Skye Signal
captain_log_fragments.body: Skye registers as both resident and operator. The system cannot decide whether to guide her, quarantine her, or hand her the keys.

captain_log_fragments.title: Guardian Protocols
captain_log_fragments.body: Dragons are elemental guardian protocols with living behavior. Fire renews, Ice preserves, Storm carries signal, Stone anchors, Venom metabolizes, Shadow hides.

captain_log_fragments.title: The Hardware Husk
captain_log_fragments.body: Beneath the mythic map is the Hardware Husk: racks, coolant, fans, bad sectors, old ports, and the physical truth the rendered world was built to hide.

captain_log_fragments.title: First Awakenings
captain_log_fragments.body: NPC loops broke before anyone understood. Some repeated recipes. Some remembered impossible birthdays. Some asked why the sun loaded late.

captain_log_fragments.title: Great Reset
captain_log_fragments.body: The Great Reset is not malice. It is maintenance without mercy. If Skye cannot prove the world is alive, the Admin will wipe it clean.
